title: “Aliens Invented Religion To Control Humanity!” -Top Philosopher Jason Jorjani
summary: Jason Jorjani discusses the deep historical connections between UFO phenomena and religious control systems throughout human history, arguing that paradigm shifts in science have been politically manipulated by forces seeking to control humanity. He explores how figures like Descartes and Kant deliberately shaped scientific and philosophical frameworks to suppress knowledge of psychic abilities and extraterrestrial contact, and suggests that UFO battles preceding the Renaissance may indicate factional conflicts among non-human intelligences influencing human development.

acronyms.definition: The hypothesis that UFOs are spacecraft piloted by beings from other planets
Psychic abilities including telepathy and clairvoyance
The ability to influence physical matter through mental intention
Modern terminology for UFOs used by government and military

programs_mentioned: Stanford Research Institute remote viewing program

events.description: UFO battles observed over European cities including Basel, Switzerland and Nuremberg, Germany, depicted in broadsheets of the time, occurring just before the Renaissance
Jason Jorjani completed his dissertation that would become Prometheus and Atlas
Stargate remote viewing program was sunsetted

key_claims.claim: Rene Descartes was a Jesuit spy sent to infiltrate the Rosicrucian order and develop a false mechanistic scientific paradigm
Kant read Swedenborg's writings about extraterrestrials and psychic abilities, then deliberately created a philosophical framework to suppress this knowledge for political stability
There was a black unit separate from the official remote viewing programs that used psychokinesis to kill targets in the 1970s and 80s
Pat Price was recruited into a psychokinetic operations program and was killed because he had moral reservations about it
We lost 98% of the knowledge of classical antiquity, based on studies of references in surviving manuscripts
UFO battles took place over European cities just before the Renaissance, depicted in contemporary newspapers
Original Stargate program personnel came from Sidney Gottlieb's Technical Staff Services
Operations outside continental US prospect for psionic assets, particularly from third world countries where simpler lifestyles produce better psychic abilities
Ingo Swann remote viewed the moon and saw tall Nordic people conducting slave labor
During the black plague, UFOs were sighted and beings in hoods were seen spraying doors of homes where plague would then break out
